title: 2024 Singapore pay by company type
summary: Median self-reported total annual compensation for Singapore respondents paid in SGD, grouped by company type. Company types below the minimum safe size of 10 are folded into a single "Other (merged)" bucket, published only when that bucket itself reaches 10.
methodology: Raw survey responses filtered to Singapore respondents paid in SGD; median compensation per company type; sub-threshold types folded into one merged bucket; MIN_SAFE_COHORT = 10 enforced before publication.
